items.item_description: Review recently created assets for naming convention compliance
items.notes: Hygiene check runs every 3 weeks via Slack workflow in #air2600-martech-fy26-support-general

items.item_description: Confirm E3 team consistency — all E3-created assets end in | E3
Update lead scoring change log if any scoring criteria were modified
items.notes: Change log should include date, what changed, and who made the change

items.item_description: Archive any deprecated assets (old workflows, inactive forms, unused lists)
Notify team of any significant changes made to workflows or properties
